final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing WeChat official account article cover image for a fragrance new product launch titled "染秋".

Style/medium: needs a high-end, luxurious aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be center composition with the title as the dominant focal element
Subject: must include the fragrance new product launch theme "染秋香氛新品发布"
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumnal atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a refined, premium mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking autumn warmth and elegance — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a high-quality, tactile surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: must preserve 900×500 horizontal aspect ratio; title text must be visually prominent and legible
Avoid:
